calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Off Calendar

Motion & Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Gerald J. Beaudoin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ZARC RECYCLING, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABITLITY COMPANY,
No appearance by defaulted defendant FRANK J. LONGHITANO,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Randy Ly sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $25,050.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,636.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $875.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $29,561.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Jul-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
